title: Update tsk init to create project/ directories
description: Replace current bd init flow with creation of project/ and optional project-local/ plus .gitignore entry. No config, database, or daemon artifacts.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: tsk init now creates project/ and optional project-local/ (python/src/taskulus/file_io.py, rust/src/file_io.rs). Verified by features/initialization/project_initialization.feature in behave and cucumber.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: tsk init creates project/; optionally creates project-local/ and adds .gitignore entry; no .beads or daemon artifacts created.
